parameters.subsql:
WITH logs AS (
    -- Уже смэтченные лиды по логам входа и выхода
    SELECT zakupki_id,
           COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS joins,
           COUNT(date_left) AS lefts,
           SUM(leads) AS leads,
           SUM(total_qual) AS total_qual,
           SUM(total_book) AS total_book,
           SUM(total_deal_amount) AS total_deal_amount,
           -- Вычисляем lifetime как разницу между датой выхода и датой входа в днях
           ROUND(AVG(CASE 
               WHEN date_left IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(DAY FROM date_left - date_join)
               ELSE NULL 
           END), 2) AS lifetime,
           -- Считаем количество пользователей, которые пробыли 3 и более дней
           COUNT(DISTINCT CASE 
               WHEN date_left IS NOT NULL AND EXTRACT(DAY FROM date_left - date_join) >= 3 THEN user_id
               ELSE NULL 
           END) AS days3
    FROM telegram_logs_leads
    GROUP BY zakupki_id
)

SELECT date,
       city,
       channel_name,
       channel_link,
       cost,
       i.category,
       i.adv_reach,

       CASE 
           WHEN i.adv_reach > 0 THEN ROUND(c.cost / i.adv_reach::numeric, 2) * 1000
           ELSE NULL 
       END AS CPM,

       CASE 
           WHEN l.joins > 0 THEN ROUND(c.cost / l.joins::numeric, 2) 
           ELSE NULL 
       END AS CPF,

       l.joins,
       l.lefts,
       l.lifetime,
       l.days3,

       CASE 
            WHEN l.joins > 0 THEN ROUND(l.days3::numeric / l.joins, 2) * 100
            ELSE NULL 
       END AS days3_per_join,

       CASE 
           WHEN l.days3 > 0 THEN ROUND(c.cost / l.days3::numeric, 2) 
           ELSE NULL 
       END AS cost_per_days3,

       l.leads,
       l.total_qual,
       l.total_book,
       l.total_deal_amount,

       CASE 
           WHEN l.days3 > 0 THEN ROUND(l.leads::numeric / l.days3 * 100, 2) 
           ELSE NULL 
       END AS CRL,

       CASE 
           WHEN l.leads > 0 THEN ROUND(c.cost / l.leads::numeric, 2) 
           ELSE NULL 
       END AS CPL,

       CASE 
           WHEN l.leads > 0 THEN ROUND(l.total_qual::numeric / l.leads, 2) 
           ELSE NULL 
       END AS CRQL,

       CASE 
           WHEN l.total_qual > 0 THEN ROUND(c.cost / l.total_qual::numeric, 2) 
           ELSE NULL 
       END AS CPQL

FROM zakupki c
LEFT JOIN zakupki_info i ON c.channel_link_part = i.channel
LEFT JOIN logs l ON c.id = l.zakupki_id
WHERE i.category IS NOT NULL
      AND i.category NOT IN ('404', '500', 'moder', 'NaN')
ORDER BY c.date DESC
